review: AWS ECS runtime-readiness plan set — round 5 telemetry and Guardrails expansion
process: Independent reality, architecture, quality, and systems passes. Each blocker was repaired and re-reviewed against current source, command surfaces, live Filigree state, and cross-plan failure paths.
verdict_summary: GO to execute the dependency DAG, including new Plans 14 and 15 before Plan 10. No plan-design blocker remains. Runtime GO still requires one unchanged 0.7.1 candidate to pass Plan 12, including CloudWatch/X-Ray telemetry, Bedrock Guardrails, rollback, evidence, and teardown gates.

non_blocking_residuals.title: Hosted CI does not build the lean INSTALL_EXTRAS image
non_blocking_residuals.disposition: Plan 10 and Plan 12 perform a real local build/run; retain overview follow-up 8.

non_blocking_residuals.title: S3 conditional put is not exercised against LocalStack or real S3
non_blocking_residuals.disposition: Botocore request shape and error mapping remain covered; retain overview follow-up 9.

repairs_verified: Plan 00 and design retargeted to release/0.7.1 with a 17-step live Filigree DAG before Plan 12.
Plan 01 target validation, redaction, environment provenance, exact checks, project-environment commands, static gates, and Wardline handoff repaired.
All executable scoped pytest commands in Plans 02-11 use uv run.
Plan 10 waits for every preceding implementation slice and records a clean pre-Plan-10 rollback-baseline source.
Plan 13 independently owns exact Cognito authorization origin, explicit client_id access-token mode, provider applicability, and callback-state regression coverage.

Plan 14 owns the previously missing AWS operational-telemetry deployment: generic OTLP under a mandatory AWS web overlay, web OTLP metrics, CloudWatch Agent, alarms, and Landscape-correlated acceptance.

Plan 15 owns explicit prompt-attack and harmful-content Guardrail transforms plus an enabled/preferred control inventory for the target LLM; Plan 09 no longer implies shielding through provider refusal handling.

Plan 12 builds and binds immutable candidate and rollback-baseline images, bootstraps the baseline before four-phase Cognito evidence, rehearses first and upgrade rollback modes, exports durable evidence, and aggregates every cleanup failure before final verdict.
verification: Ruff check and format-check over the Plan 01 implementation snippet
JSON parse of all AWS ECS review artifacts
live Filigree full-plan and issue dependency inspection

review_history.summary: Round 3 found app-layer data_dir creation and missing ECS service health-check grace-period controls; both were subsequently repaired along with recorded medium findings.

The first release/0.7.1 pass found stale branch/tracker ownership, Plan 01 executability, unowned closeout/runbook work, Cognito cross-origin and access-token gaps, rollback-baseline provenance, and failure-path cleanup gaps; all were repaired and independently re-reviewed.

The telemetry and safety review confirmed Landscape/audit and generic OTLP already exist, but AWS deployment telemetry and AWS-native prompt/content shields were unowned. Plans 14/15, cross-plan acceptance, and live tracker dependencies now own those gaps.
